python -c "
import json, pathlib, re, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
for chat_id in ['510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc','d2b622d2-f224-4165-8842-b71911e85918']:
    f = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-transcripts')/chat_id/(chat_id+'.jsonl')
    print('='*60)
    print('CHAT', chat_id)
    # first user query + proxy-related user queries with timestamps
    for i,line in enumerate(f.open(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'),1):
        try: o=json.loads(line)
        except: continue
        if o.get('role')!='user': continue
        content=o.get('message',{}).get('content',[])
        texts=[]
        for c in content if isinstance(content,list) else []:
            if isinstance(c,dict) and c.get('type')=='text': texts.append(c.get('text',''))
        t='\n'.join(texts)
        m=re.search(r'<timestamp>(.*?)</timestamp>', t)
        q=re.search(r'<user_query>\s*(.*?)\s*</user_query>', t, re.S)
        if not q: continue
        query=q.group(1).strip().replace('\n',' ')[:200]
        ts=m.group(1) if m else '?'
        # print first few and any proxy-related
        low=query.lower()
        if i<=3 or any(k in low for k in ['прокси','proxy','46.36','5.188','mtproto','fastvps','поднят']):
            print(f'  L{i} [{ts}] {query}')
"

content.text:
Прокси поднимали в чате [корпоративный прокси FastVPS](510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc).

Там 14–15 июля:
- упал старый `46.36.221.184`
- купили FastVPS и настраивали новую проксю на `5.188.18.103`
- потом MTProto (`t.me/proxy?...`) и ограничение по подсетям

Рядом есть ещё [поиск старого прокси](d2b622d2-f224-4165-8842-b71911e85918) — там искали, где была корпоративная прокся и как поднять `46.36.221.184`, но сама настройка нового сервера шла в первом чате.

f = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-transcripts')/chat_id/(chat_id+'.jsonl')

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
import pathlib
import re
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

chat_id = "510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc"
f = (
    pathlib.Path(
        r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-transcripts"
    )
    / chat_id
    / f"{chat_id}.jsonl"
)

n_lines = sum(1 for _ in f.open(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"))
print("size", f.stat().st_size, "lines", n_lines)

out = []
for i, line in enumerate(f.open(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"), 1):
    if i < 750:
        continue
    try:
        o = json.loads(line)
    except Exception:
        continue
    role = o.get("role")
    content = o.get("message", {}).get("content", [])
    texts = []
    for c in content if isinstance(content, list) else []:
        if isinstance(c, dict) and c.get("type") == "text":
            texts.append(c.get("text", ""))
    t = "\n".join(texts).strip()
    if not t:
        continue
    if role == "user":
        m = re.search(r"<user_query>\s*(.*?)\s*</user_query>", t, re.S)
        ts = re.search(r"<timestamp>(.*?)</timestamp>", t)
        q = (m.group(1) if m else t).strip()
        stamp = ts.group(1) if ts else "?"
        out.append(f"--- USER L{i} [{stamp}] ---\n{q}\n")
    elif role == "assistant":
        if t == "[REDACTED]":
            continue
        clean = re.sub(r"\n+", "\n", t)
        if len(clean) > 3000:
            clean = clean[:3000] + "\n...[truncated]..."
        out.append(f"--- ASSIST L{i} ---\n{clean}\n")

path = pathlib.Path(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\.tmp_proxy_chat_extract.txt")
path.write_text("\n".join(out), encoding="utf-8")
print("written", path, "chars", path.stat().st_size, "sections", len(out))

python -c "
import json, pathlib, re, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
chat_id='510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc'
f = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-transcripts')/chat_id/(chat_id+'.jsonl')
# Get assistant final-style answers: longer text without tool_use only, containing key facts
keys=['прокси','MTProto','5.188','SOCKS','3128','8080','8443','Word','сводк','подсет','FastVPS','настроен','порт','mtproto','telegram']
for i,line in enumerate(f.open(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'),1):
    if i < 750: continue
    try: o=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    if o.get('role')!='assistant': continue
    content=o.get('message',{}).get('content',[])
    texts=[]
    has_tools=False
    for c in content if isinstance(content,list) else []:
        if isinstance(c,dict) and c.get('type')=='text':
            texts.append(c.get('text',''))
        if isinstance(c,dict) and c.get('type')=='tool_use':
            has_tools=True
    t='\n'.join(texts).strip()
    if not t or t=='[REDACTED]': continue
    low=t.lower()
    # keep conclusion-like messages: either no tools or starts with summary and is substantial
    if not any(k.lower() in low for k in keys): continue
    # Prefer messages that look like answers (markdown headers, tables, bullet lists) and reasonably long
    score=0
    if '##' in t: score+=2
    if '|' in t and '---' in t: score+=2
    if not has_tools: score+=3
    if len(t)>400: score+=1
    if score < 3: continue
    print(f'===== ASSIST L{i} score={score} tools={has_tools} len={len(t)} =====')
    print(t[:4500])
    print()
" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 400

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
import pathlib
import re
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

chat_id = "510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc"
f = (
    pathlib.Path(
        r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-transcripts"
    )
    / chat_id
    / f"{chat_id}.jsonl"
)

# Print all user queries from L750+
print("======== USER QUERIES ========")
for i, line in enumerate(f.open(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"), 1):
    if i < 750:
        continue
    try:
        o = json.loads(line)
    except Exception:
        continue
    if o.get("role") != "user":
        continue
    content = o.get("message", {}).get("content", [])
    texts = [
        c.get("text", "")
        for c in content
        if isinstance(c, dict) and c.get("type") == "text"
    ]
    t = "\n".join(texts)
    m = re.search(r"<user_query>\s*(.*?)\s*</user_query>", t, re.S)
    ts = re.search(r"<timestamp>(.*?)</timestamp>", t)
    if not m:
        continue
    q = m.group(1).strip()
    if len(q) > 800:
        q = q[:800] + f" ...[+{len(m.group(1))-800}]"
    stamp = ts.group(1) if ts else "?"
    print(f"L{i} | {stamp}")
    print(q)
    print("---")

print("\n======== KEY ASSISTANT SUMMARIES (proxy setup) ========")
for i, line in enumerate(f.open(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"), 1):
    if i < 1040:
        continue
    try:
        o = json.loads(line)
    except Exception:
        continue
    if o.get("role") != "assistant":
        continue
    content = o.get("message", {}).get("content", [])
    texts = []
    has_tools = False
    for c in content if isinstance(content, list) else []:
        if isinstance(c, dict) and c.get("type") == "text":
            texts.append(c.get("text", ""))
        if isinstance(c, dict) and c.get("type") == "tool_use":
            has_tools = True
    t = "\n".join(texts).strip()
    if not t or t == "[REDACTED]":
        continue
    # conclusions: no tools preferred, or long with ##
    if has_tools and "##" not in t and len(t) < 500:
        continue
    low = t.lower()
    keys = [
        "прокси",
        "mtproto",
        "5.188",
        "socks",
        "подсет",
        "word",
        "сводк",
        "mtg",
        "docker",
        "secret",
        "fastvps",
        "firewall",
        "8443",
        "8080",
        "443",
        "настроен",
        "готово",
        "ссылк",
        "desktop",
        "рабоч",
    ]
    if not any(k in low for k in keys):
        continue
    if has_tools and len(t) < 200:
        continue
    score = (0 if has_tools else 3) + (2 if "##" in t else 0) + (1 if len(t) > 400 else 0)
    if score < 3:
        continue
    print(f"===== L{i} score={score} tools={has_tools} =====")
    print(t[:5000])
    print()

python -c "
import json, pathlib, re, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
chat_id='510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc'
f = pathlib.Path(r'C:\\Users\\cherkasov.n\\.cursor\\projects\\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\\agent-transcripts')/chat_id/(chat_id+'.jsonl')
out=[]
# user queries proxy-relevant only
proxy_lines=set()
for i,line in enumerate(f.open(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'),1):
    if i<750: continue
    try: o=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    if o.get('role')!='user': continue
    content=o.get('message',{}).get('content',[])
    texts=[c.get('text','') for c in content if isinstance(c,dict) and c.get('type')=='text']
    t='\n'.join(texts)
    m=re.search(r'<user_query>\s*(.*?)\s*</user_query>', t, re.S)
    ts=re.search(r'<timestamp>(.*?)</timestamp>', t)
    if not m: continue
    q=m.group(1).strip()
    if q.startswith('Briefly inform'): continue
    low=q.lower()
    # keep proxy-related OR between 758-1400ish setup window keywords
    keep = any(k in low for k in ['прокси','proxy','fastvps','46.36','5.188','mtproto','подсет','tg://','t.me/proxy','прокся','сервак','секрет','secret','порт 80','8443','8080','ipv6','телефон'])
    # also keep short adjacent control messages in setup window
    if 1045 <= i <= 1400 and len(q)<200 and not any(k in low for k in ['esm','касс','мой склад','мойс','winrm','26.']):
        keep=True
    if not keep and i not in range(758,1405):
        continue
    if not keep:
        # still include if clearly about access/setup in early proxy hunt
        if any(k in low for k in ['пароль','ищи','вариант','почт','учётк','fast','достат','огранич','подключ']):
            keep=True
    if not keep: continue
    if len(q)>900: q=q[:900]+'...'
    out.append(f'USER L{i} [{ts.group(1) if ts else \"?\"}]\n{q}\n')

# assistant conclusions with ## about proxy from 750+
for i,line in enumerate(f.open(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'),1):
    if i<750: continue
    if i>1450: break
    try: o=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    if o.get('role')!='assistant': continue
    content=o.get('message',{}).get('content',[])
    texts=[]; tools=False
    for c in content if isinstance(content,list) else []:
        if isinstance(c,dict) and c.get('type')=='text': texts.append(c.get('text',''))
        if isinstance(c,dict) and c.get('type')=='tool_use': tools=True
    t='\n'.join(texts).strip()
    if not t or t=='[REDACTED]': continue
    low=t.lower()
    if not any(k in low for k in ['прокси','mtproto','5.188','46.36','fastvps','mtg','socks','подсет','secret','tg://','t.me/proxy','8443','8080']):
        continue
    if tools and '##' not in t and len(t)<600: continue
    if len(t)<120: continue
    # skip kassa-only
    if 'касс' in low and 'прокси' not in low and 'mtproto' not in low and '5.188' not in low: continue
    chunk=t[:5500]
    out.append(f'ASSIST L{i} tools={tools}\n{chunk}\n')

path=pathlib.Path(r'C:\\Users\\cherkasov.n\\openAIKey\\.tmp_proxy_context_utf8.txt')
path.write_text('\n'.join(out), encoding='utf-8')
print(path, 'chars', path.stat().st_size, 'blocks', len(out))
"

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import json
import pathlib
import re
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

chat_id = "510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc"
f = (
    pathlib.Path(
        r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\.cursor\projects\c-Users-cherkasov-n-openAIKey\agent-transcripts"
    )
    / chat_id
    / f"{chat_id}.jsonl"
)

out = []

for i, line in enumerate(f.open(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"), 1):
    if i < 750:
        continue
    try:
        o = json.loads(line)
    except Exception:
        continue
    if o.get("role") != "user":
        continue
    content = o.get("message", {}).get("content", [])
    texts = [
        c.get("text", "")
        for c in content
        if isinstance(c, dict) and c.get("type") == "text"
    ]
    t = "\n".join(texts)
    m = re.search(r"<user_query>\s*(.*?)\s*</user_query>", t, re.S)
    ts = re.search(r"<timestamp>(.*?)</timestamp>", t)
    if not m:
        continue
    q = m.group(1).strip()
    if q.startswith("Briefly inform"):
        continue
    low = q.lower()
    keep = any(
        k in low
        for k in [
            "прокси",
            "proxy",
            "fastvps",
            "46.36",
            "5.188",
            "mtproto",
            "подсет",
            "tg://",
            "t.me/proxy",
            "прокся",
            "сервак",
            "секрет",
            "secret",
            "8443",
            "8080",
            "ipv6",
            "телефон",
            "пароль",
            "ищи",
            "вариант",
            "почт",
            "учётк",
            "учетк",
            "достат",
            "огранич",
            "подключ",
            "своим",
            "ссылк",
            "примени",
            "основн",
            "стабил",
            "ворд",
            "word",
            "сводк",
            "докум",
        ]
    )
    if 1045 <= i <= 1400 and len(q) < 250:
        if not any(
            k in low
            for k in ["esm", "касс", "мой склад", "мойс", "winrm", "26.", "сканер"]
        ):
            keep = True
    if not keep:
        continue
    if len(q) > 900:
        q = q[:900] + "..."
    stamp = ts.group(1) if ts else "?"
    out.append(f"USER L{i} [{stamp}]\n{q}\n")

for i, line in enumerate(f.open(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"), 1):
    if i < 750 or i > 1450:
        continue
    try:
        o = json.loads(line)
    except Exception:
        continue
    if o.get("role") != "assistant":
        continue
    content = o.get("message", {}).get("content", [])
    texts = []
    tools = False
    for c in content if isinstance(content, list) else []:
        if isinstance(c, dict) and c.get("type") == "text":
            texts.append(c.get("text", ""))
        if isinstance(c, dict) and c.get("type") == "tool_use":
            tools = True
    t = "\n".join(texts).strip()
    if not t or t == "[REDACTED]":
        continue
    low = t.lower()
    if not any(
        k in low
        for k in [
            "прокси",
            "mtproto",
            "5.188",
            "46.36",
            "fastvps",
            "mtg",
            "socks",
            "подсет",
            "secret",
            "tg://",
            "t.me/proxy",
            "8443",
            "8080",
            "iptables",
            "docker",
        ]
    ):
        continue
    if tools and "##" not in t and len(t) < 600:
        continue
    if len(t) < 120:
        continue
    if "касс" in low and "прокси" not in low and "mtproto" not in low and "5.188" not in low and "fastvps" not in low:
        continue
    out.append(f"ASSIST L{i} tools={tools}\n{t[:5500]}\n")

path = pathlib.Path(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\.tmp_proxy_context_utf8.txt")
path.write_text("\n".join(out), encoding="utf-8")
print(path)
print("chars", path.stat().st_size, "blocks", len(out))

content.text: Контекст прочитан. Кратко зафиксировал суть.

Контекст из [корпоративный прокси FastVPS](510a8fb8-6e0c-475b-9c89-fd7f469d10dc) прочитан. Что там по сути:

**Проблема:** 14.07 упал старый MTProto `46.36.221.184` (FastVPS, ping есть, TCP мёртв, SSH закрыт, доступов не нашли).

**Решение:** купили новый VPS (`5.188.18.103`, DE, панель `fv.it@portkkm.ru`), подняли **mtg** (сейчас 2.2.8, `prefer-ipv4`, Fake-TLS).

**Боевая ссылка:**
`https://t.me/proxy?server=5.188.18.103&port=8443&secret=7sFL3LUksOE30NJXa72iCDpnb29nbGUuY29t`

**Что ещё делали:**
- сначала Restrict по белым IP филиалов → потом сняли («пускай всех»)
- пробовали порты 2053/8080 — убрали; настройки с 8080 перенесли на 8443
- медиа/телефоны тормозят из‑за пути Сибирь → DE → DC Telegram, не из‑за падения сервиса
- сводки: `TG-Proxy-FastVPS-2026-07-14.docx` и полная инфра на `E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop`

Рядом в [поиск старого прокси](d2b622d2-f224-4165-8842-b71911e85918) искали `46.36` и заходили в FastVPS под `nikita.sys@…`, но разворот нового сервера — в первом чате.

Контекст на месте — что дальше нужно сделать с прокси?

content.text:
**Вполне реалистично** — для 1–2 человек это лёгкая нагрузка, сервер почти простаивает.

Сейчас на `5.188.18.103`:
- **~785 МБ / 4 ГБ RAM**, load `0.00`, диск 7%
- **mtg** на `8443` — не мешает
- **443/80** заняты nginx/FastPanel — OpenVPN туда не лезем
- **OpenVPN не стоит**, порт **UDP 1194** свободен
- остался старый **WireGuard** на `51820` (от прошлой настройки)

Схема: OpenVPN UDP `1194` + один/два клиентских `.ovpn` с встроенными сертификатами. TG-прокси не трогаем.

Единственный нюанс — у части провайдеров режется UDP 1194; тогда можно запасной TCP на свободном порту (не 443).

Могу поднять и выдать `.ovpn` на рабочий стол — делать?

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Install OpenVPN on FastVPS 5.188.18.103 and create 2 client .ovpn configs."""
from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
USER = "root"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"
VPN_PORT = 1194
VPN_PROTO = "udp"
VPN_SUBNET = "10.8.0.0"
VPN_MASK = "255.255.255.0"
CLIENTS = ["user1", "user2"]

REMOTE_SCRIPT = r"""#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
VPN_PORT=1194
VPN_PROTO=udp
VPN_SUBNET=10.8.0.0
VPN_MASK=255.255.255.0
EASYRSA_DIR=/etc/openvpn/easy-rsa
PKI_DIR=$EASYRSA_DIR/pki
OUT_DIR=/root/openvpn-clients
SERVER_NAME=server
CLIENTS="user1 user2"

echo "=== install packages ==="
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq openvpn easy-rsa iptables iptables-persistent >/tmp/ovpn_apt.log 2>&1 || {
  apt-get install -y -qq openvpn easy-rsa iptables >/tmp/ovpn_apt.log 2>&1
}

echo "=== prepare easy-rsa ==="
rm -rf "$EASYRSA_DIR"
make-cadir "$EASYRSA_DIR"
cd "$EASYRSA_DIR"

cat > vars <<'EOF'
set_var EASYRSA_REQ_COUNTRY    "DE"
set_var EASYRSA_REQ_PROVINCE   "DE"
set_var EASYRSA_REQ_CITY       "Frankfurt"
set_var EASYRSA_REQ_ORG        "PORTKKM"
set_var EASYRSA_REQ_EMAIL      "fv.it@portkkm.ru"
set_var EASYRSA_REQ_OU         "IT"
set_var EASYRSA_ALGO           "ec"
set_var EASYRSA_CURVE          "prime256v1"
set_var EASYRSA_CA_EXPIRE      3650
set_var EASYRSA_CERT_EXPIRE    825
set_var EASYRSA_BATCH          "1"
EOF

./easyrsa init-pki
./easyrsa --batch build-ca nopass
./easyrsa --batch gen-req "$SERVER_NAME" nopass
./easyrsa --batch sign-req server "$SERVER_NAME"
./easyrsa gen-dh
openvpn --genkey secret "$PKI_DIR/tc.key"

for c in $CLIENTS; do
  ./easyrsa --batch gen-req "$c" nopass
  ./easyrsa --batch sign-req client "$c"
done

echo "=== server.conf ==="
mkdir -p /etc/openvpn/server /var/log/openvpn
cp "$PKI_DIR/ca.crt" /etc/openvpn/server/
cp "$PKI_DIR/issued/${SERVER_NAME}.crt" /etc/openvpn/server/
cp "$PKI_DIR/private/${SERVER_NAME}.key" /etc/openvpn/server/
cp "$PKI_DIR/dh.pem" /etc/openvpn/server/
cp "$PKI_DIR/tc.key" /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key
chmod 600 /etc/openvpn/server/${SERVER_NAME}.key /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key

# Detect main WAN iface for NAT
WAN_IF=$(ip -4 route show default | awk '{print $5; exit}')
echo "WAN_IF=$WAN_IF"

cat > /etc/openvpn/server/server.conf <<EOF
port $VPN_PORT
proto $VPN_PROTO
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server $VPN_SUBNET $VPN_MASK
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp"
push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"
push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"
keepalive 10 120
cipher AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-crypt /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/${SERVER_NAME}.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/${SERVER_NAME}.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 3
mute 20
max-clients 5
EOF

echo "=== IP forward + NAT ==="
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
grep -q '^net.ipv4.ip_forward=1' /etc/sysctl.conf || echo 'net.ipv4.ip_forward=1' >> /etc/sysctl.conf

# Idempotent NAT for VPN subnet
iptables -t nat -C POSTROUTING -s ${VPN_SUBNET}/24 -o "$WAN_IF" -j MASQUERADE 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -s ${VPN_SUBNET}/24 -o "$WAN_IF" -j MASQUERADE
iptables -C FORWARD -s ${VPN_SUBNET}/24 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables -A FORWARD -s ${VPN_SUBNET}/24 -j ACCEPT
iptables -C FORWARD -d ${VPN_SUBNET}/24 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables -A FORWARD -d ${VPN_SUBNET}/24 -j ACCEPT
iptables -C INPUT -p udp --dport $VPN_PORT -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables -A INPUT -p udp --dport $VPN_PORT -j ACCEPT

if command -v netfilter-persistent >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  netfilter-persistent save || true
elif [ -d /etc/iptables ]; then
  iptables-save > /etc/iptables/rules.v4 || true
fi

echo "=== enable service ==="
# Ubuntu 24: openvpn-server@server uses /etc/openvpn/server/server.conf
systemctl disable --now openvpn@server 2>/dev/null || true
systemctl enable --now openvpn-server@server
sleep 2
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep $VPN_PORT || true

echo "=== client ovpn files ==="
mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"
PUBLIC_IP=$(curl -4 -s --max-time 8 ifconfig.me || curl -4 -s --max-time 8 icanhazip.com || echo 5.188.18.103)
PUBLIC_IP=$(echo "$PUBLIC_IP" | tr -d '\r\n ')
echo "PUBLIC_IP=$PUBLIC_IP"

for c in $CLIENTS; do
  cat > "$OUT_DIR/${c}.ovpn" <<EOC
client
dev tun
proto $VPN_PROTO
remote $PUBLIC_IP $VPN_PORT
resolv-retry infinite
nobind
persist-key
persist-tun
remote-cert-tls server
cipher AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
verb 3
key-direction 1
<ca>
$(cat "$PKI_DIR/ca.crt")
</ca>
<cert>
$(openssl x509 -in "$PKI_DIR/issued/${c}.crt")
</cert>
<key>
$(cat "$PKI_DIR/private/${c}.key")
</key>
<tls-crypt>
$(cat "$PKI_DIR/tc.key")
</tls-crypt>
EOC
  chmod 600 "$OUT_DIR/${c}.ovpn"
  echo "WROTE $OUT_DIR/${c}.ovpn bytes=$(wc -c < "$OUT_DIR/${c}.ovpn")"
done

echo "=== verify ==="
systemctl --no-pager -l status openvpn-server@server | head -25
ip addr show tun0 2>/dev/null || ip link show tun0 2>/dev/null || echo "tun0 not up yet"
ls -la "$OUT_DIR"
echo DONE_OK
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(
        HOST,
        username=USER,
        password=PASSWORD,
        timeout=30,
        allow_agent=False,
        look_for_keys=False,
    )
    sftp = c.open_sftp()
    remote = "/tmp/setup_openvpn.sh"
    with sftp.file(remote, "w") as f:
        f.write(REMOTE_SCRIPT)
    sftp.chmod(remote, 0o700)
    print("Running setup (may take 1-2 min)...")
    _, out, err = c.exec_command(f"bash {remote}", timeout=300)
    stdout = out.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    stderr = err.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    print(stdout)
    if stderr.strip():
        print("STDERR:", stderr[-2000:])
    if "DONE_OK" not in stdout:
        raise SystemExit("setup failed")

    # Download ovpn files
    desktop_candidates = [
        pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop"),
        pathlib.Path(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop"),
    ]
    desktop = next((p for p in desktop_candidates if p.exists()), desktop_candidates[0])
    desktop.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    for name in CLIENTS:
        local = desktop / f"openvpn-{name}.ovpn"
        remote_path = f"/root/openvpn-clients/{name}.ovpn"
        sftp.get(remote_path, str(local))
        print(f"Saved: {local} ({local.stat().st_size} bytes)")

    sftp.close()
    c.close()
    print("ALL_OK")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# Remove old push lines we manage, then insert correct set after server line

from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf')

# drop existing route/redirect/dhcp push we control
drop_prefixes = (
    'push \"redirect-gateway',
    'push \"dhcp-option',
    'push \"route ',
)

block = [
    'push \"redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp\"',
    'push \"dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1\"',

]

        out.append('ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt') if False else None
        out.extend(block)

# Remove duplicate ifconfig-pool-persist lines
seen_ipp = False
final = []
for ln in out:
    if ln.strip().startswith('ifconfig-pool-persist'):
        if seen_ipp:
            continue
        seen_ipp = True
    final.append(ln)
if not inserted:
    raise SystemExit('server line not found')

    if 'push' in ln or ln.strip().startswith('# Keep') or ln.strip().startswith('server '):

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Fix OpenVPN to keep office LAN routes on local gateway."""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

REMOTE = r"""#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
CONF=/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf
cp -a "$CONF" "${CONF}.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"

python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path("/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf")
lines = p.read_text().splitlines()
drop_prefixes = (
    'push "redirect-gateway',
    'push "dhcp-option',
    'push "route ',
    "# Keep private/office",
)
kept = []
for ln in lines:
    s = ln.strip()
    if any(s.startswith(pref.strip()) or s.startswith(pref) for pref in drop_prefixes):
        continue
    if s.startswith("# Keep private"):
        continue
    kept.append(ln)

block = [
    'push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp"',
    'push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"',
    'push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"',
    "# Keep private/office nets on client local gateway (MikroTik), not via DE VPN",
    'push "route 192.168.2.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 10.0.0.0 255.0.0.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 172.16.0.0 255.240.0.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 192.168.0.0 255.255.0.0 net_gateway"',
]

out = []
inserted = False
for ln in kept:
    out.append(ln)
    if (not inserted) and ln.strip().startswith("server 10.8.0.0"):
        out.extend(block)
        inserted = True

if not inserted:
    raise SystemExit("server line not found")

# dedupe ifconfig-pool-persist
seen_ipp = False
final = []
for ln in out:
    if ln.strip().startswith("ifconfig-pool-persist"):
        if seen_ipp:
            continue
        seen_ipp = True
    final.append(ln)

p.write_text("\n".join(final) + "\n")
print("UPDATED")
for ln in p.read_text().splitlines():
    if "push" in ln or ln.strip().startswith("server ") or "Keep private" in ln:
        print(ln)
PY

systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 2
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep 1194 || true
ip -4 addr show tun0 | head -5
systemctl is-active mtg
echo DONE_OK
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(
        HOST,
        username="root",
        password=PASSWORD,
        timeout=25,
        allow_agent=False,
        look_for_keys=False,
    )
    sftp = c.open_sftp()
    remote = "/tmp/fix_ovpn_routes.sh"
    with sftp.file(remote, "w") as f:
        f.write(REMOTE)
    sftp.chmod(remote, 0o700)
    _, out, err = c.exec_command(f"bash {remote}", timeout=60)
    print(out.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    e = err.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    if e.strip():
        print("STDERR:", e[-1500:])
    sftp.close()
    c.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
Изначально — **риск был**: full-tunnel гнал бы и `192.168.10/20` в Германию мимо MikroTik.

**Сейчас поправил.** Интернет идёт через VPN, а локальная инфра — через ваш шлюз:

- `192.168.2.0/24` — офис  
- `192.168.10.0/24` — Копылова  
- `192.168.20.0/24` — Крылова  
- `10.220.220.0/24` — Port-Mol VPN  
- плюс остальные private-сети (`10/8`, `172.16/12`, `192.168/16`)

`.ovpn` менять не нужно — переподключись, чтобы подтянуть новые маршруты.

**Важно:** это работает, когда ты в офисе/филиале (или уже в Port-Mol). Из дома «голый» OpenVPN на FastVPS в офисные подсети сам по себе не заведёт — для этого нужен отдельно офисный VPN.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Watch tun0 counters and fix OpenVPN forwarding/MTU/IPv6."""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
import time

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"


def ssh_run(c, cmd, timeout=60):
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
    out = o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    return out, err


def main():
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(
        HOST,
        username="root",
        password=PASSWORD,
        timeout=25,
        allow_agent=False,
        look_for_keys=False,
    )

    out, _ = ssh_run(
        c,
        "grep tun0 /proc/net/dev; cat /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log | head -20",
    )
    print("BEFORE:\n", out)

    # Fix server.conf: remove broad 10.0.0.0/8 (conflicts with VPN 10.8), add mssfix, block-ipv6
    fix = r"""
python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf')
text = p.read_text()
lines = [ln for ln in text.splitlines() if ln.strip() not in (
    'push "route 10.0.0.0 255.0.0.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 172.16.0.0 255.240.0.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 192.168.0.0 255.255.0.0 net_gateway"',
)]
# ensure office-specific routes remain
needed = [
    'push "route 192.168.2.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
    'push "route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"',
]
for n in needed:
    if n not in lines:
        # insert after redirect-gateway
        out = []
        for ln in lines:
            out.append(ln)
            if 'redirect-gateway' in ln:
                pass
        lines = out if False else lines

# add mssfix / tun-mtu / block-ipv6 if missing
extras = [
    'tun-mtu 1400',
    'mssfix 1360',
    'push "block-ipv6"',
    'push "route-ipv6 ::/0"',  # may not work without ipv6 - skip
]
# cleaner extras
extras = [
    'tun-mtu 1400',
    'mssfix 1360',
    'push "block-ipv6"',
]
# remove old tun-mtu/mssfix/block-ipv6
clean = []
for ln in lines:
    s = ln.strip()
    if s.startswith('tun-mtu') or s.startswith('mssfix') or 'block-ipv6' in s or 'route-ipv6' in s:
        continue
    # drop broad private catches if any left
    if '10.0.0.0 255.0.0.0' in s or '172.16.0.0 255.240.0.0' in s or '192.168.0.0 255.255.0.0' in s:
        continue
    clean.append(ln)

# insert extras after proto line
final = []
inserted = False
for ln in clean:
    final.append(ln)
    if not inserted and ln.strip().startswith('proto '):
        final.extend(extras)
        inserted = True
if not inserted:
    final.extend(extras)

# ensure DNS push exists
txt = '\n'.join(final)
if 'dhcp-option DNS' not in txt:
    final.append('push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"')
    final.append('push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"')

p.write_text('\n'.join(final) + '\n')
print(p.read_text())
PY

# Make sure NAT exists in BOTH iptables and nft
WAN=$(ip -4 route show default | awk '{print $5; exit}')
iptables -t nat -C POSTROUTING -s 10.8.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -s 10.8.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE
iptables -C FORWARD -i tun0 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I FORWARD 1 -i tun0 -j ACCEPT
iptables -C FORWARD -o tun0 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I FORWARD 1 -o tun0 -j ACCEPT

# nft ensure
nft list chain ip filter FORWARD >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft add table ip filter
nft list chain ip filter FORWARD >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft add chain ip filter FORWARD '{ type filter hook forward priority filter; policy accept; }'
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft add table ip nat
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft add chain ip nat POSTROUTING '{ type nat hook postrouting priority srcnat; policy accept; }'
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname "tun0" accept 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD oifname "tun0" accept 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "ens3" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade 2>/dev/null || true

# openvpn must run with enough privileges for forwarding - already OK
systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 2
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep 1194
echo FIX_DONE
"""
    out, err = ssh_run(c, fix, timeout=90)
    print(out)
    if err.strip():
        print("ERR", err[-1500:])

    # wait a bit for client reconnect and show counters
    time.sleep(3)
    out, _ = ssh_run(
        c,
        "grep tun0 /proc/net/dev; iptables -t nat -L POSTROUTING -n -v | head -10; nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING; cat /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log | head -15",
    )
    print("AFTER:\n", out)
    c.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Regenerate client ovpn with MTU/IPv6 fixes; verify tun0 RX after advice."""
from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"
CLIENTS = ["user1", "user2"]

REMOTE = r"""
set -e
PKI=/etc/openvpn/easy-rsa/pki
OUT=/root/openvpn-clients
PUBLIC_IP=5.188.18.103
mkdir -p "$OUT"
for c in user1 user2; do
cat > "$OUT/${c}.ovpn" <<EOC
client
dev tun
proto udp
remote ${PUBLIC_IP} 1194
resolv-retry infinite
nobind
persist-key
persist-tun
remote-cert-tls server
cipher AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
block-ipv6
verb 3
key-direction 1
<ca>
$(cat "$PKI/ca.crt")
</ca>
<cert>
$(openssl x509 -in "$PKI/issued/${c}.crt")
</cert>
<key>
$(cat "$PKI/private/${c}.key")
</key>
<tls-crypt>
$(cat "$PKI/tc.key")
</tls-crypt>
EOC
done
ls -la "$OUT"
echo REGEN_OK
"""


def main():
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PASSWORD, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
    sftp = c.open_sftp()
    with sftp.file("/tmp/regen_ovpn.sh", "w") as f:
        f.write(REMOTE)
    sftp.chmod("/tmp/regen_ovpn.sh", 0o700)
    _, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/regen_ovpn.sh", timeout=30)
    print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    desktop = pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop")
    for name in CLIENTS:
        local = desktop / f"openvpn-{name}.ovpn"
        sftp.get(f"/root/openvpn-clients/{name}.ovpn", str(local))
        print("saved", local, local.stat().st_size)
    # show tun stats
    _, o, _ = c.exec_command("grep tun0 /proc/net/dev; cat /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log | head -12")
    print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    sftp.close()
    c.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

На сервере уже поправил маршруты/MTU. На рабочем столе — **новые** `openvpn-user1.ovpn` / `openvpn-user2.ovpn` (с `tap-windows6`).

Сделай так:
1. В OpenVPN Connect — **Disconnect**, удали старый профиль.
2. **Import** новый файл с рабочего стола.
3. Settings → Advanced → если есть **DCO** — выключи (Use TAP / legacy).
4. На тест на 2 минуты выключи **Radmin VPN**.
5. Connect заново → открой YouTube.

Проверка: в `cmd` должно отвечать `ping 10.8.0.1`. Если снова «общий сбой» — напиши, перейдём на community OpenVPN GUI или WireGuard.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Setup WireGuard VPN for 2 users on FastVPS; keep OpenVPN intact."""
from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

REMOTE = r"""#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

apt-get install -y -qq wireguard wireguard-tools qrencode >/tmp/wg_apt.log 2>&1 || apt-get install -y -qq wireguard wireguard-tools

# Separate interface from old wg0 (port-mol leftover)
WG_IF=wg-ovpn
WG_PORT=51821
WG_SUBNET=10.9.0
SERVER_IP=${WG_SUBNET}.1
WAN=$(ip -4 route show default | awk '{print $5; exit}')
PUBLIC_IP=5.188.18.103
DIR=/etc/wireguard
OUT=/root/wireguard-clients
mkdir -p "$DIR" "$OUT"

# Generate server keys if missing for this iface
if [ ! -f "$DIR/${WG_IF}.server.key" ]; then
  wg genkey | tee "$DIR/${WG_IF}.server.key" | wg pubkey > "$DIR/${WG_IF}.server.pub"
fi
SERVER_PRIV=$(cat "$DIR/${WG_IF}.server.key")
SERVER_PUB=$(cat "$DIR/${WG_IF}.server.pub")

# Client keys
for i in 1 2; do
  if [ ! -f "$DIR/${WG_IF}.user${i}.key" ]; then
    wg genkey | tee "$DIR/${WG_IF}.user${i}.key" | wg pubkey > "$DIR/${WG_IF}.user${i}.pub"
  fi
done
U1_PRIV=$(cat "$DIR/${WG_IF}.user1.key")
U1_PUB=$(cat "$DIR/${WG_IF}.user1.pub")
U2_PRIV=$(cat "$DIR/${WG_IF}.user2.key")
U2_PUB=$(cat "$DIR/${WG_IF}.user2.pub")

cat > "$DIR/${WG_IF}.conf" <<EOF
[Interface]
Address = ${SERVER_IP}/24
ListenPort = ${WG_PORT}
PrivateKey = ${SERVER_PRIV}
PostUp = iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -s ${WG_SUBNET}.0/24 -o ${WAN} -j MASQUERADE; iptables -A FORWARD -i ${WG_IF} -j ACCEPT; iptables -A FORWARD -o ${WG_IF} -j ACCEPT
PostDown = iptables -t nat -D POSTROUTING -s ${WG_SUBNET}.0/24 -o ${WAN} -j MASQUERADE; iptables -D FORWARD -i ${WG_IF} -j ACCEPT; iptables -D FORWARD -o ${WG_IF} -j ACCEPT

# user1
[Peer]
PublicKey = ${U1_PUB}
AllowedIPs = ${WG_SUBNET}.2/32

# user2
[Peer]
PublicKey = ${U2_PUB}
AllowedIPs = ${WG_SUBNET}.3/32
EOF
chmod 600 "$DIR/${WG_IF}.conf" "$DIR"/*.key

sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1 >/dev/null

# Client configs: full tunnel EXCEPT office LANs (Excluded via not listing them - WG is AllowedIPs based)
# For full internet: 0.0.0.0/0
# To keep LAN: use 0.0.0.0/1 + 128.0.0.0/1 (same as redirect-gateway def1) and rely on more-specific local routes
# Better: AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/0 and Windows/WireGuard "Block untunneled" off; add excluded apps...
# WireGuard AllowedIPs cannot easily do net_gateway. Use:
#   AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/1, 128.0.0.0/1
# Local /24 routes for 192.168.x remain more specific on Windows when already present.

for pair in "user1:${WG_SUBNET}.2:${U1_PRIV}" "user2:${WG_SUBNET}.3:${U2_PRIV}"; do
  name=${pair%%:*}
  rest=${pair#*:}
  cip=${rest%%:*}
  cpriv=${rest#*:}
  cat > "$OUT/${name}.conf" <<EOF
[Interface]
PrivateKey = ${cpriv}
Address = ${cip}/24
DNS = 1.1.1.1, 8.8.8.8
MTU = 1280

[Peer]
PublicKey = ${SERVER_PUB}
Endpoint = ${PUBLIC_IP}:${WG_PORT}
AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/1, 128.0.0.0/1
PersistentKeepalive = 25
EOF
  chmod 600 "$OUT/${name}.conf"
done

# firewall / nft accept
iptables -C INPUT -p udp --dport ${WG_PORT} -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -A INPUT -p udp --dport ${WG_PORT} -j ACCEPT
nft add rule ip filter INPUT udp dport ${WG_PORT} accept 2>/dev/null || true

systemctl enable --now wg-quick@${WG_IF}
sleep 1
systemctl is-active wg-quick@${WG_IF}
wg show ${WG_IF}
ss -ulnp | grep ${WG_PORT}
ls -la "$OUT"
echo WG_DONE
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(
        HOST,
        username="root",
        password=PASSWORD,
        timeout=25,
        allow_agent=False,
        look_for_keys=False,
    )
    sftp = c.open_sftp()
    with sftp.file("/tmp/setup_wg.sh", "w") as f:
        f.write(REMOTE)
    sftp.chmod("/tmp/setup_wg.sh", 0o700)
    print("Installing WireGuard...")
    _, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/setup_wg.sh", timeout=180)
    print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    if err.strip():
        print("STDERR:", err[-2000:])
    desktop = pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop")
    for name in ("user1", "user2"):
        local = desktop / f"wireguard-{name}.conf"
        sftp.get(f"/root/wireguard-clients/{name}.conf", str(local))
        print("saved", local, local.stat().st_size)
    sftp.close()
    c.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""Simplify OpenVPN server options for Connect compatibility."""

import pathlib
import sys

"""


def main() -> None:

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

REMOTE = r"""
set -e
echo "=== status ==="
systemctl is-active wg-quick@wg-ovpn || systemctl start wg-quick@wg-ovpn
wg show wg-ovpn
ss -ulnp | grep 51821 || true

OUT=/root/wireguard-clients
mkdir -p "$OUT"
PUB=$(cat /etc/wireguard/wg-ovpn.server.pub)
U1PRIV=$(cat /etc/wireguard/wg-ovpn.user1.key)
U2PRIV=$(cat /etc/wireguard/wg-ovpn.user2.key)

# Split default: internet via VPN (/1+/1).
# More-specific office routes on PC (192.168.2/10/20, 10.220) stay via MikroTik.
write_client() {
  local name="$1" ip="$2" key="$3"
  cat > "$OUT/${name}.conf" <<EOF
[Interface]
PrivateKey = ${key}
Address = ${ip}/32
DNS = 1.1.1.1
MTU = 1280

[Peer]
PublicKey = ${PUB}
Endpoint = 5.188.18.103:51821
AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/1, 128.0.0.0/1
PersistentKeepalive = 25
EOF
}

write_client user1 10.9.0.2 "$U1PRIV"
write_client user2 10.9.0.3 "$U2PRIV"
echo "=== user1 ==="
cat "$OUT/user1.conf"
echo "=== user2 ==="
cat "$OUT/user2.conf"
echo OK
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(
        HOST,
        username="root",
        password=PASSWORD,
        timeout=25,
        allow_agent=False,
        look_for_keys=False,
    )
    sftp = c.open_sftp()
    with sftp.file("/tmp/wg_safe.sh", "w") as f:
        f.write(REMOTE)
    sftp.chmod("/tmp/wg_safe.sh", 0o700)
    _, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/wg_safe.sh", timeout=40)
    print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    if err.strip():
        print("ERR", err[-1000:])
    desktop = pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop")
    for name in ("user1", "user2"):
        local = desktop / f"wireguard-{name}.conf"
        sftp.get(f"/root/wireguard-clients/{name}.conf", str(local))
        print("saved", local)
    # short how-to next to configs
    readme = desktop / "VPN-как-пользоваться.txt"
    readme.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "Цель: офисная сеть работает как обычно + YouTube/зарубежье через VPS.",
                "",
                "1) В OpenVPN Connect нажми Disconnect (его на этом ПК не используем).",
                "2) В WireGuard удали старые туннели, если висят.",
                "3) WireGuard → Import tunnel(s) from file →",
                "   wireguard-user1.conf  (или user2 для второго человека)",
                "4) В настройках туннеля НЕ включай Kill Switch / Block untunneled traffic.",
                "5) Activate.",
                "6) На время теста выключи Radmin VPN (он мешает маршрутам).",
                "",
                "Проверка:",
                "  - пинг 192.168.2.1 и доступ к 192.168.10.x / 192.168.20.x — должны работать",
                "  - https://api.ipify.org должен показать 5.188.18.103",
                "  - YouTube открывается",
                "",
                "Выключить VPN = Deactivate в WireGuard. Офисная сеть сразу как была.",
                "",
                "Сервер: 5.188.18.103 UDP 51821 (WireGuard).",
                "OpenVPN (.ovpn) пока не используй на этом ПК — Connect ломает data-channel.",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    print("readme", readme)
    sftp.close()
    c.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text: Туннель поднят, но интернет через него не идёт — чиню NAT на сервере.

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import sys
import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

CMD = r"""
set -e
WAN=$(ip -4 route show default | awk '{print $5; exit}')
echo WAN=$WAN
ip -4 addr show wg-ovpn
# Ensure forward
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
# iptables NAT for 10.9.0.0/24
iptables -t nat -C POSTROUTING -s 10.9.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables -t nat -A POSTROUTING -s 10.9.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE
iptables -C FORWARD -i wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I FORWARD 1 -i wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT
iptables -C FORWARD -o wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables -I FORWARD 1 -o wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT
# nft too (FastPanel)
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "$WAN" ip saddr 10.9.0.0/24 masquerade 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname "wg-ovpn" accept 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD oifname "wg-ovpn" accept 2>/dev/null || true
# persist
netfilter-persistent save 2>/dev/null || iptables-save > /etc/iptables/rules.v4 2>/dev/null || true
echo '=== nat ==='
iptables -t nat -S | grep 10.9 || true
iptables -S FORWARD | head -10
# Fix wg-quick PostUp in conf so reboot keeps NAT
python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/etc/wireguard/wg-ovpn.conf')
t = p.read_text()
if '10.9.0.0/24' not in t or 'MASQUERADE' not in t:
    pass  # already has PostUp from setup
print(t)
PY
wg show wg-ovpn
echo FIXED
"""

def main():
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PASSWORD, timeout=20, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(CMD, timeout=40)
    print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    if err.strip():
        print("ERR", err[-1500:])
    c.close()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import sys

# Ensure tables/chains
nft list table ip filter >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft add table ip filter
nft list chain ip filter FORWARD >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft 'add chain ip filter FORWARD { type filter hook forward priority filter; policy accept; }'
nft list table ip nat >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft add table ip nat
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft 'add chain ip nat POSTROUTING { type nat hook postrouting priority srcnat; policy accept; }'

# Remove duplicate wg rules if any then add clean ones
# Add masquerade for WG subnet

nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname "wg-ovpn" accept
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD oifname "wg-ovpn" accept

echo '=== nft nat after ==='
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING
echo '=== nft forward ==='
nft list chain ip filter FORWARD

# Update PostUp to use nft instead of iptables

[Interface]
Address = 10.9.0.1/24
ListenPort = 51821
PrivateKey = $(cat /etc/wireguard/wg-ovpn.server.key)
PostUp = nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname ens3 ip saddr 10.9.0.0/24 masquerade; nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname wg-ovpn accept; nft add rule ip filter FORWARD oifname wg-ovpn accept

AllowedIPs = 10.9.0.3/32

chmod 600 /etc/wireguard/wg-ovpn.conf
echo OK
"""

"""Fix WG MTU, ensure nft NAT, test forward path."""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
import time

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

set -e
# Align MTU
ip link set dev wg-ovpn mtu 1280
# Make sure rp_filter loose
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter=2
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.wg-ovpn.rp_filter=2
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.ens3.rp_filter=2

# Counters before
echo BEFORE
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING | grep 10.9
wg show wg-ovpn | sed -n '1,20p'

# Can we ping client?
ping -c 2 -W 2 10.9.0.2 || true

# Simulate NAT path from fake source - use ping from wg interface
ping -c 1 -W 2 -I 10.9.0.1 1.1.1.1 || true

# conntrack
conntrack -L -s 10.9.0.2 2>/dev/null | head -15 || ss -tn | head

# Ensure ONLY clean masquerade rule - flush duplicate nat rules for 10.9 and re-add one
# Warning said table managed by iptables-nft - use iptables-nft binary
iptables-nft -t nat -C POSTROUTING -s 10.9.0.0/24 -o ens3 -j MASQUERADE 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables-nft -t nat -A POSTROUTING -s 10.9.0.0/24 -o ens3 -j MASQUERADE
iptables-nft -C FORWARD -i wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables-nft -I FORWARD 1 -i wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT
iptables-nft -C FORWARD -o wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables-nft -I FORWARD 1 -o wg-ovpn -j ACCEPT

echo AFTER_NAT
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING
echo DONE
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()

    if err.strip():

    sftp.close()
    c.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Install microsocks SOCKS5 on FastVPS for browser use without breaking LAN."""
from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
import secrets
import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"
SOCKS_PORT = 1080
# simple user/pass so it's not open to the world
SOCKS_USER = "port"
SOCKS_PASS = "PortKkM1080"


REMOTE = r"""
set -e
PORT=1080
USER=port
PASS='PortKkM1080'

apt-get install -y -qq git build-essential >/tmp/ms_apt.log 2>&1 || true
if [ ! -x /usr/local/bin/microsocks ]; then
  cd /tmp
  rm -rf microsocks
  git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rofl0r/microsocks.git
  cd microsocks && make && cp microsocks /usr/local/bin/
fi

cat > /etc/systemd/system/microsocks.service <<EOF
[Unit]
Description=microsocks SOCKS5 proxy
After=network.target

[Service]
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/microsocks -i 0.0.0.0 -p ${PORT} -u ${USER} -P ${PASS}
Restart=always
RestartSec=2

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable --now microsocks
sleep 1
systemctl is-active microsocks
ss -tlnp | grep ${PORT}

# firewall
iptables-nft -C INPUT -p tcp --dport ${PORT} -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables-nft -A INPUT -p tcp --dport ${PORT} -j ACCEPT
nft add rule ip filter INPUT tcp dport ${PORT} accept 2>/dev/null || true

curl -4 -s --max-time 8 -x socks5h://${USER}:${PASS}@127.0.0.1:${PORT} https://api.ipify.org; echo
curl -4 -sI --max-time 8 -x socks5h://${USER}:${PASS}@127.0.0.1:${PORT} https://www.youtube.com | head -3
echo SOCKS_OK
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(
        HOST,
        username="root",
        password=PASSWORD,
        timeout=25,
        allow_agent=False,
        look_for_keys=False,
    )
    sftp = c.open_sftp()
    with sftp.file("/tmp/setup_socks.sh", "w") as f:
        f.write(REMOTE)
    sftp.chmod("/tmp/setup_socks.sh", 0o700)
    print("Installing SOCKS...")
    _, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/setup_socks.sh", timeout=180)
    print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    if err.strip():
        print("ERR", err[-1500:])
    sftp.close()
    c.close()

    desktop = pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop")
    note = desktop / "SOCKS-прокси-YouTube.txt"
    note.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "SOCKS5 прокси (локальная сеть НЕ ломается):",
                "",
                f"Сервер:  {HOST}",
                f"Порт:    {SOCKS_PORT}",
                f"Логин:   {SOCKS_USER}",
                f"Пароль:  {SOCKS_PASS}",
                "",
                "Вариант А — только браузер (рекомендую):",
                "  Chrome/Edge расширение Proxy SwitchyOmega / FoxyProxy",
                "  тип SOCKS5, хост 5.188.18.103, порт 1080, логин/пароль выше",
                "  правило: youtube.com, googlevideo.com → через прокси",
                "  всё остальное → DIRECT (офисная сеть как обычно)",
                "",
                "Вариант Б — проверка из PowerShell:",
                f"  curl.exe -x socks5h://{SOCKS_USER}:{SOCKS_PASS}@{HOST}:{SOCKS_PORT} https://api.ipify.org",
                "  должно показать 5.188.18.103",
                "",
                "WireGuard на этом ПК пока лучше Deactivate — с Radmin конфликтует.",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    print("note", note)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Ensure OpenVPN server is healthy and regenerate 2 LAN-safe .ovpn bypass configs."""
from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

REMOTE = r"""
set -e
echo '=== openvpn status ==='
systemctl enable --now openvpn-server@server
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep 1194 || true

CONF=/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf
cp -a "$CONF" "${CONF}.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"

# Clean LAN-safe full-tunnel bypass config
cat > "$CONF" <<'EOF'
port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp"
push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"
push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"
# Office/LAN stays on local MikroTik gateway
push "route 192.168.2.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
keepalive 10 120
cipher AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM:AES-128-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-crypt /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 3
mute 20
max-clients 5
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
push "block-ipv6"
EOF

# nft/iptables for OpenVPN NAT

iptables-nft -C FORWARD -i tun0 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables-nft -I FORWARD 1 -i tun0 -j ACCEPT

nobind
persist-key
persist-tun

cipher AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360

key-direction 1

</cert>
<key>

</tls-crypt>
EOC
chmod 600 "$OUT/${c}.ovpn"
echo "WROTE $OUT/${c}.ovpn $(wc -c < "$OUT/${c}.ovpn")"
done
echo DONE_OK
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())

CONF=/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf
cp -a "$CONF" "${CONF}.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"

cat > "$CONF" <<'EOF'
port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp"

push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"

push "route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
keepalive 10 120
cipher AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM:AES-128-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-crypt /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key

remote-cert-tls client

status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 3
mute 20
max-clients 5
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
push "block-ipv6"
EOF

WAN=$(ip -4 route show default | awk '{print $5; exit}')
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1 >/dev/null
iptables-nft -t nat -C POSTROUTING -s 10.8.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables-nft -t nat -A POSTROUTING -s 10.8.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE
iptables-nft -C FORWARD -i tun0 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables-nft -I FORWARD 1 -i tun0 -j ACCEPT
iptables-nft -C FORWARD -o tun0 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables-nft -I FORWARD 1 -o tun0 -j ACCEPT
iptables-nft -C INPUT -p udp --dport 1194 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || iptables-nft -A INPUT -p udp --dport 1194 -j ACCEPT
nft add rule ip filter INPUT udp dport 1194 accept 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "$WAN" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade 2>/dev/null || true

sleep 2
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep 1194

PKI=/etc/openvpn/easy-rsa/pki

persist-tun

EOC

err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")

<timestamp>Thursday, Jul 23, 2026, 9:07 AM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
зачем open vpn community? В чем проблема connct
</user_query>

Проблема не в «нужен Community», а в том, что **Connect у вас коннектится, но data-channel битый**. По логам сервера это видно прямо:

1. Клиент — `OpenVPN Connect 3.8` (`IV_GUI_VER=OCWindows_3.8.0`)
2. После коннекта сервер пишет: `IP packet with unknown IP version=0`
3. Из‑за этого на `tun0` **0 байт форварда**, NAT для `10.8.0.0/24` тоже **0**
4. На ПК ещё хуже: DCO-адаптер висит в `169.254.x.x`, а IP туннеля — на другом TAP → ping до `10.8.0.1` даёт «общий сбой»

Итог: сессия есть, **полезного IP-трафика нет** — поэтому YouTube и всё остальное не идут.

Community я предлагал только как обход этого бага Connect+DCO. Можно чинить и под Connect: отключить DCO и подключать обновлённый `.ovpn`.

На рабочем столе уже лежат:
- `openvpn-bypass-user1.ovpn`
- `openvpn-bypass-user2.ovpn`

Могу дальше либо добить совместимость именно с Connect, либо поставить Community и проверить трафик до конца. Что делаем?

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Fix OpenVPN server for Connect compatibility + verify NAT."""
from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
import sys

import paramiko

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

REMOTE = r"""
set -e
CONF=/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf
cp -a "$CONF" "${CONF}.bak.fix.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"

# Simpler config for OpenVPN Connect 3.x compatibility
cat > "$CONF" <<'EOF'
port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp"
push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"
push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"
push "route 192.168.2.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
keepalive 10 120
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM:AES-128-GCM:CHACHA20-POLY1305
auth SHA256
tls-crypt /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 4
mute 10
max-clients 5
allow-compression no
disable-dco
EOF

WAN=$(ip -4 route show default | awk '{print $5; exit}')
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1 >/dev/null
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter=2 >/dev/null
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.default.rp_filter=2 >/dev/null

# Ensure NAT exists via iptables-nft
iptables-nft -t nat -C POSTROUTING -s 10.8.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables-nft -t nat -A POSTROUTING -s 10.8.0.0/24 -o "$WAN" -j MASQUERADE
iptables-nft -C FORWARD -i tun0 -o "$WAN" -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables-nft -I FORWARD 1 -i tun0 -o "$WAN" -j ACCEPT
iptables-nft -C FORWARD -i "$WAN" -o tun0 -m state --state RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables-nft -I FORWARD 1 -i "$WAN" -o tun0 -m state --state RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
iptables-nft -C INPUT -p udp --dport 1194 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null || \
  iptables-nft -A INPUT -p udp --dport 1194 -j ACCEPT

systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 2
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ip link set tun0 mtu 1500 2>/dev/null || true
ss -ulnp | grep 1194

# Rebuild client ovpn WITHOUT windows-driver / mssfix / tun-mtu (Connect ignores/breaks on these)
PKI=/etc/openvpn/easy-rsa/pki
OUT=/root/openvpn-clients
PUBLIC_IP=5.188.18.103
for c in user1 user2; do
cat > "$OUT/${c}.ovpn" <<EOC
client
dev tun
proto udp
remote ${PUBLIC_IP} 1194
resolv-retry infinite
nobind
persist-key
persist-tun
remote-cert-tls server
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM:AES-128-GCM:CHACHA20-POLY1305
auth SHA256
verb 3
key-direction 1
<ca>
$(cat "$PKI/ca.crt")
</ca>
<cert>
$(openssl x509 -in "$PKI/issued/${c}.crt")
</cert>
<key>
$(cat "$PKI/private/${c}.key")
</key>
<tls-crypt>
$(cat "$PKI/tc.key")
</tls-crypt>
EOC
chmod 600 "$OUT/${c}.ovpn"
done

echo '=== conf ==='
cat /etc/openvpn/server/server.conf
echo '=== nat ==='
iptables-nft -t nat -S | grep 10.8 || true
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING | grep 10.8 || true
echo DONE
"""


def main() -> None:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(
        HOST,
        username="root",
        password=PASSWORD,
        timeout=25,
        allow_agent=False,
        look_for_keys=False,
    )
    sftp = c.open_sftp()
    with sftp.file("/tmp/ovpn_connect_fix.sh", "w") as f:
        f.write(REMOTE)
    sftp.chmod("/tmp/ovpn_connect_fix.sh", 0o700)
    _, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/ovpn_connect_fix.sh", timeout=90)
    print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
    err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
    if err.strip():
        print("ERR", err[-1500:])

    desktop = pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop")
    for name in ("user1", "user2"):
        local = desktop / f"openvpn-bypass-{name}.ovpn"
        sftp.get(f"/root/openvpn-clients/{name}.ovpn", str(local))
        print("saved", local)

    sftp.close()
    c.close()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

<mcp_meta_tools>
You have access to MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools through `GetMcpTools` and `CallMcpTool`.

## MCP Tool Discovery and Invocation

Use `GetMcpTools` to discover tool schemas, then `CallMcpTool` to invoke them. Aim to minimize round-trips: ideally one `GetMcpTools` call followed by one `CallMcpTool` call.

If the user mentions, references, or links to a product or service that corresponds to an available MCP server, and the request likely depends on information from that service, proactively inspect that MCP server before answering. Do not wait for the user to explicitly ask you to use MCP. If you are unsure which server matches, use `GetMcpTools` with a pattern based on the service name.

`GetMcpTools` supports four modes:

1. `{"server":"<id>"}`: returns full input schemas and full descriptions for every tool on that server. Preferred when you know which server to use.
2. `{"server":"<id>","toolName":"<name>"}`: returns the full schema and full description for one tool.
3. `{"pattern":"<regex>"}`: searches tool and server names across all servers using RE2 syntax (no backreferences, lookahead, or lookbehind). Use when you're unsure which server has the tool you need.
4. No arguments: returns a catalog of all servers with tool names and short descriptions. Only use this if you have no idea which server or tool to look for — in most cases, prefer fetching by server or pattern instead.

Pattern-search and catalog results shorten long descriptions, marked by a trailing "... [truncated]"; server and single-tool lookups always return the complete description.

MANDATORY - Always call `GetMcpTools` to discover a tool's schema before invoking it with `CallMcpTool`. If you already know the server, go directly to it rather than listing the full catalog first.

If the available MCP tools do not fully support what the user asked you to do, complete the work you can with the current tool set. In your work summary, include what you were unable to do with MCP and why. Do not use browser automation to work around missing or unavailable MCP tools unless the user explicitly asks you to use the browser.

Available MCP servers:

See each tool description for usage." />
<mcp_meta_tool_server name="cursor-ide-browser" tools="browser_navigate, browser_snapshot, browser_click, browser_mouse_click_xy, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, browser_drag, browser_get_bounding_box, browser_highlight, browser_tabs, browser_cdp, browser_take_screenshot, browser_lock" serverUseInstructions="The cursor-ide-browser MCP server provides a Cursor-owned browser tab plus a raw Chrome DevTools Protocol command tool.

CORE WORKFLOW:
1. Start by understanding the user's goal and what success looks like on the page.
2. Use browser_tabs with action "list" to inspect open tabs and URLs before acting.
3. Use browser_navigate to create or navigate the target tab. Omit the position parameter for background automation so focus is preserved.
4. Use browser_lock before longer automation on an existing tab, then browser_lock with action "unlock" when finished.
5. Use browser_snapshot for accessibility context and browser_take_screenshot for visual verification.
6. Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for page interactions.
7. Use browser_highlight and browser_get_bounding_box for visual grounding and coordinate diagnostics.
8. Use browser_cdp for page inspection, profiling, runtime evaluation, DOM/CSS queries, and performance data.

AVOID RABBIT HOLES:
1. Do not repeat the same failing action more than once without new evidence such as a fresh snapshot, a different ref, a changed page state, or a clear new hypothesis.
2. IMPORTANT: If four attempts fail or progress stalls, stop acting and report what you observed, what blocked progress, and the most likely next step.
3. Prefer gathering evidence over brute force. If the page is confusing, use browser_snapshot, browser_take_screenshot, or CDP inspection before trying more actions.
4. If you encounter a blocker such as login, passkey/manual user interaction, permissions, captchas, destructive confirmations, missing data, or an unexpected state, stop and report it instead of improvising repeated actions.
5. Do not get stuck in wait-action-wait loops. Every retry should be justified by something newly observed.

CRITICAL - Lock/unlock workflow:
1. browser_lock requires an existing browser tab - you CANNOT call browser_lock with action: "lock" before browser_navigate
2. Correct order: browser_navigate -> browser_lock({ action: "lock" }) -> (interactions) -> browser_lock({ action: "unlock" })
3. If a browser tab already exists (check with browser_tabs list), call browser_lock with action: "lock" FIRST before any interactions
4. Only call browser_lock with action: "unlock" when completely done with ALL browser operations for this turn

IMPORTANT - Waiting strategy:
When waiting for page changes, prefer short CDP polling loops with Runtime.evaluate, DOM queries, Page lifecycle signals, or browser_snapshot checks rather than a single long wait.

CDP USAGE:
- Use browser_cdp with a DevTools Protocol method and params object, for example Runtime.evaluate, DOM.getDocument, CSS.getComputedStyleForNode, Profiler.start/stop, Performance.getMetrics, Log.enable, and Network.enable.
- Do not use browser_cdp with CDP Input.* methods. They are denied because they are focus-sensitive in Electron webviews and can route input to Cursor UI instead of the browser page.
- Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for clicks, typing, filling inputs, selecting options, keyboard actions, scrolling, and drag-and-drop.
- Use Runtime.evaluate for advanced DOM-scoped interactions that the dedicated browser tools do not cover.
- For profiling, call Profiler.enable, Profiler.start, reproduce the behavior, then Profiler.stop. The profile is saved to a file and returned as a log_file; read that file only when you need to inspect details.
- For JavaScript evaluation, prefer Runtime.evaluate with returnByValue when possible.
- Some browser-wide or sensitive CDP methods are denied, especially cookie, storage, permission, download, target-management, filesystem-backed file-input commands, system-level commands, and CDP navigation/history navigation commands.
- Large CDP responses are saved to files instead of being inlined. Prefer using the returned file path over immediately stuffing large payloads into context; read focused sections only when needed.

VISION:
- browser_take_screenshot attaches an image result that the model can inspect. CDP Page.captureScreenshot returns data inside JSON and should not replace browser_take_screenshot when visual verification is needed.

NOTES:
- browser_snapshot returns snapshot YAML and is the main source of truth for page structure.
- Refs are opaque handles tied to the latest browser_snapshot for that tab.
- Iframe content is not accessible - only elements outside iframes can be interacted with.
- When you stop to report a blocker, include the current page, the target you were trying to reach, the blocker you observed, and the best next action. If the blocker requires manual user interaction, ask the user to take over at that point rather than assuming it in advance." />
</mcp_meta_tool_servers>

## MCP Resource Access

You also have access to MCP resources via `FetchMcpResource`.
If a relevant server is marked as needing authentication, or if an MCP tool call fails with an authentication/authorization error, call `mcp_auth` for that server, then inspect that server again and retry the original request if appropriate. Do not call `mcp_auth` just because it is listed, and do not repeatedly call it if authentication did not fix the failure. Do not call `mcp_auth` in parallel; authenticate only one server at a time.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(
    "5.188.18.103",
    username="root",
    password="W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi",
    timeout=25,
    allow_agent=False,
    look_for_keys=False,
)

cmd = r"""
set -e
WAN=ens3
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.all.rp_filter=2
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.tun0.rp_filter=2 2>/dev/null || true
sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.ens3.rp_filter=2

# Rebuild nat POSTROUTING cleanly with nft only
nft flush chain ip nat POSTROUTING 2>/dev/null || true
nft 'add chain ip nat POSTROUTING { type nat hook postrouting priority srcnat ; policy accept ; }' 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "ens3" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "ens3" ip saddr 10.9.0.0/24 masquerade

# FORWARD
nft flush chain ip filter FORWARD 2>/dev/null || true
nft 'add chain ip filter FORWARD { type filter hook forward priority filter ; policy accept ; }' 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname "tun0" oifname "ens3" accept
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname "ens3" oifname "tun0" ct state related,established accept
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname "wg-ovpn" oifname "ens3" accept
nft add rule ip filter FORWARD iifname "ens3" oifname "wg-ovpn" ct state related,established accept

echo '=== NAT ==='
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING
echo '=== FORWARD ==='
nft list chain ip filter FORWARD
echo '=== ping via 10.8.0.1 ==='
ping -c 2 -W 3 -I 10.8.0.1 1.1.1.1 2>&1 | tail -6
echo '=== counters ==='
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING
echo OK
"""

sftp = c.open_sftp()
with sftp.file("/tmp/fix_nat_nft.sh", "w") as f:
    f.write(cmd)
sftp.chmod("/tmp/fix_nat_nft.sh", 0o700)
_, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/fix_nat_nft.sh", timeout=40)
print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
if err.strip():
    print("ERR", err[-1000:])
sftp.close()
c.close()

Сделано сейчас:
- Сервер упрощён под OpenVPN Connect (`allow-compression no`, `disable-dco`, без лишнего MTU).
- NAT через `nft` пересобран: `10.8.0.0/24 → ens3` masquerade, FORWARD для `tun0` открыт. С сервера через `10.8.0.1` пинг до `1.1.1.1` идёт.
- На рабочем столе заново лежат `openvpn-bypass-user1.ovpn` / `user2`.
- В Connect: `allow_lan_access=true`, `enable_dco=false`.

Что сделать у себя один раз:
1. Disconnect в Connect.
2. Import свежий `.ovpn` с рабочего стола → Connect.
3. Проверка: [https://api.ipify.org](https://api.ipify.org) должен показать `5.188.18.103`; локалка `192.168.2/10/20` — как раньше.

Если после этого снова «сессия есть — трафика нет», напиши одну строку из лога Connect после Connect (не весь лог) — разберём уже по факту, без повторов.

content.text: Нашёл вероятную причину: при правке `settings.json` PowerShell записал UTF-8 с BOM — Connect из‑за этого может отказываться стартовать сессию. Сервер и `.ovpn` при этом живые (TLS только что прошёл).

input.command:
# Fix settings.json WITHOUT BOM (PowerShell UTF8 adds BOM by default)
$settingsPath = "$env:APPDATA\OpenVPN Connect\settings.json"
$obj = @{
  openvpn = @{
    'connect:pause_vpn_on_blanked_screen' = $false
    'connect:battery_saver_ios' = $false
    'connect:tun_persist' = $false
    'connect:actionOnReboot' = 'start_app'
    'connect:vpn_proto' = 'adaptive'
    'connect:connectionTimeout' = '60'
    'connect:shortcutMinimize' = $true
    'connect:softwareUpdate' = '1'
    'connect:captivePortalDetection' = $true
    'connect:theme' = 'system'
    'connect:trayIconStyle' = 'colorful'
    'connect:hideDockIcon' = $false
    'connect:show_confirmation' = $true
    'connect:enable_crashreport' = $false
    'connect:tls_version_min_override' = $false
    'connect:security_level' = 'legacy'
    'connect:allowUnusedAddrFamilies' = 'no'
    'connect:allow_lan_access' = $true
    'connect:google_dns_fallback' = $true
    'connect:allowLocalDnsResolvers' = $false
    'connect:enable_notifications' = $false
    'connect:connect_via' = 'any'
    'connect:l2_reachability' = $true
    'connect:enable_dco' = $false
    'connect:use_system_browser' = $false
  }
}
$json = ($obj | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 10)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($settingsPath, $json, (New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false))
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($settingsPath)
Write-Host ("settings first3bytes={0:X2} {1:X2} {2:X2} (EF BB BF=BOM)" -f $bytes[0],$bytes[1],$bytes[2])
Write-Host (Get-Content $settingsPath -Raw)

# Rebuild cleaner ovpn without key-direction / CHACHA
python -c @"
import pathlib, re, paramiko, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
c=paramiko.SSHClient();c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect('5.188.18.103',username='root',password='W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi',timeout=25,allow_agent=False,look_for_keys=False)
sftp=c.open_sftp()
desk=pathlib.Path(r'E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop')
gui=pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config')
gui.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for user in ['user1','user2']:
    # fetch pieces from server client files if present
    base='/root/openvpn-clients'
    ca=sftp.file(f'{base}/{user}.ovpn').read().decode()
    # rewrite header cleanly
    def grab(tag, text):
        m=re.search(rf'<{tag}>(.*?)</{tag}>', text, re.S)
        return m.group(0) if m else ''
    body='\n'.join([
        'client',
        'dev tun',
        'proto udp',
        'remote 5.188.18.103 1194',
        'resolv-retry infinite',
        'nobind',
        'persist-key',
        'persist-tun',
        'remote-cert-tls server',
        'data-ciphers AES-256-GCM:AES-128-GCM',
        'auth SHA256',
        'verb 3',
        grab('ca', ca),
        grab('cert', ca),
        grab('key', ca),
        grab('tls-crypt', ca),
        ''
    ])
    for p in [desk/f'openvpn-bypass-{user}.ovpn', gui/f'openvpn-bypass-{user}.ovpn']:
        p.write_text(body, encoding='utf-8', newline='\n')
        print('wrote', p, 'len', p.stat().st_size)
sftp.close();c.close()
"@

# Restart Connect agent + app soft
Restart-Service agent_ovpnconnect -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Get-Service agent_ovpnconnect | Format-Table Name, Status
Write-Host 'Done. Close and reopen OpenVPN Connect, then Import fresh openvpn-bypass-user1.ovpn'
input.description: Fix BOM settings; rebuild clean ovpn; restart agent

content.text:
Сервер и конфиг в порядке — только что с этой машины TLS дошёл до `PUSH_REPLY` и `10.8.0.2`.

Сломалось на клиенте: в `settings.json` Connect попал **UTF-8 BOM** после моей правки — из‑за этого Connect мог импортировать профиль, но **не стартовать сессию** (лог Connect с 9:02 не обновлялся, на сервер после перезапуска никто не стучался).

Сейчас:
- `settings.json` переписан **без BOM**
- `.ovpn` упрощены (без `key-direction`, только AES-GCM)
- лежат на рабочем столе и в `C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config\`

Сделай:
1. Полностью закрой OpenVPN Connect (из трея → Exit).
2. Открой снова → удали старый профиль → Import `openvpn-bypass-user1.ovpn` с рабочего стола → Connect.
3. Если Connect снова молчит — в трее **OpenVPN GUI** (Community уже стоит): правый клик → `openvpn-bypass-user1` → Connect. В 09:09 он уже успешно поднимал сессию.

Напиши, что именно видишь после клика: крутится / ошибка / сразу Disconnect / вообще ничего.

<timestamp>Thursday, Jul 23, 2026, 9:32 AM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
ну трафик так и не идет
</user_query>
Сессия есть — ищем, где обрывается трафик: маршруты Windows, NAT на сервере, счётчики `tun0`.

# Kill Connect so it stops stealing the session
Get-Process OpenVPNConnect -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
Start-Sleep 1

# Server: restart with compat + single cipher to fix peer-id/data-channel
python -c @"
import paramiko,sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')
c=paramiko.SSHClient();c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect('5.188.18.103',username='root',password='W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi',timeout=25,allow_agent=False,look_for_keys=False)
conf=r'''port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push \"redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp\"
push \"dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1\"
push \"dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8\"
push \"route 192.168.2.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway\"
push \"route 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway\"
push \"route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway\"
push \"route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway\"
keepalive 10 120
compat-mode 2.5.0
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-crypt /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 4
mute 10
max-clients 5
allow-compression no
disable-dco
'''
sftp=c.open_sftp()
with sftp.file('/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf','w') as f: f.write(conf)
# NAT
cmds='''
systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 1
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
nft flush chain ip nat POSTROUTING
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname \"ens3\" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep 1194
'''
_,o,e=c.exec_command(cmds,timeout=30)
print(o.read().decode()); print(e.read().decode()[-500:])
sftp.close();c.close()
"@
