# Rebuild both client configs with force TAP
python -c @"
import pathlib, re, paramiko, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
c=paramiko.SSHClient();c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect('5.188.18.103',username='root',password='W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi',timeout=25,allow_agent=False,look_for_keys=False)
sftp=c.open_sftp()
desk=pathlib.Path(r'E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop')
gui=pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config'); gui.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for user in ['user1','user2']:
    raw=sftp.file(f'/root/openvpn-clients/{user}.ovpn').read().decode()
    def grab(tag):
        m=re.search(rf'<{tag}>.*?</{tag}>', raw, re.S)
        return m.group(0) if m else ''
    body='\n'.join([
        'client','dev tun','proto udp','remote 5.188.18.103 1194',
        'resolv-retry infinite','nobind','persist-key','persist-tun',
        'remote-cert-tls server',
        'data-ciphers AES-256-GCM','data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM',
        'auth SHA256','verb 3',
        'disable-dco','windows-driver tap-windows6',
        grab('ca'),grab('cert'),grab('key'),grab('tls-crypt'),''
    ])
    for p in [desk/f'openvpn-bypass-{user}.ovpn', gui/f'openvpn-bypass-{user}.ovpn']:
        p.write_text(body, encoding='utf-8', newline='\n')
        print('wrote', p)
sftp.close();c.close()
"@

# Adapters: enable ONLY Community TAP-Windows6; disable Connect TAP + all DCO
Get-NetAdapter | ForEach-Object {
  $d = $_.InterfaceDescription
  if ($d -eq 'TAP-Windows Adapter V9' -and $_.Name -like '*TAP-Windows6*') {
    Enable-NetAdapter -Name $_.Name -Confirm:$false -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "ENABLE $($_.Name) [$d]"
  } elseif ($d -match 'OpenVPN Connect|Data Channel Offload|TAP-Windows Adapter V9 for OpenVPN Connect') {
    Disable-NetAdapter -Name $_.Name -Confirm:$false -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "DISABLE $($_.Name) [$d]"
  }
}
# Also match Connect TAP by description exactly
Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -eq 'TAP-Windows Adapter V9 for OpenVPN Connect' } | Disable-NetAdapter -Confirm:$false -EA SilentlyContinue
Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -eq 'TAP-Windows Adapter V9' } | Enable-NetAdapter -Confirm:$false -EA SilentlyContinue

Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -match 'TAP|Offload' } | Format-Table Name, InterfaceDescription, Status, ifIndex -AutoSize

# Create a one-shot elevated scheduled task to connect (avoids interactive UAC prompt in some setups - still may need admin once)
$ovpn = 'C:\Program Files\OpenVPN\bin\openvpn.exe'
$cfg = 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config\openvpn-bypass-user1.ovpn'
$log = 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\log\openvpn-bypass-user1.log'
Get-Process openvpn -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
if (Test-Path $log) { Remove-Item $log -Force }

# Prefer interactive service: run openvpn as current user but register with service via --service windows helper
# OpenVPN 2.6+ uses automatic service; msg_channel=0 means service ACL denied this session.
# Try RunAs - will show UAC to user
Write-Host 'Launching elevated openvpn (approve UAC if asked)...'
try {
  Start-Process -FilePath $ovpn -ArgumentList @('--config', $cfg, '--log', $log) -Verb RunAs
} catch {
  Write-Host "RunAs failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
}
Start-Sleep 16
Write-Host '=== log ==='
if (Test-Path $log) { Get-Content $log -Tail 35 } else { Write-Host 'no log' }
Write-Host '=== IP/routes/ping ==='
Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -like '10.8.*' } | Format-Table InterfaceAlias,IPAddress,InterfaceIndex -AutoSize
Get-NetRoute -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.DestinationPrefix -match '^(0\.0\.0\.0/1|128\.0\.0\.0/1)' } | Format-Table DestinationPrefix,NextHop,InterfaceAlias,InterfaceIndex -AutoSize
ping -n 2 -w 2000 10.8.0.1
try { (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://api.ipify.org' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8).Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message }

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko, sys, time
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect("5.188.18.103", username="root", password="W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi", timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)

def run(cmd, t=60):
    print("====", cmd[:90])
    _, o, e = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=t)
    out = o.read().decode("utf-8", "errors")
    err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "errors")
    print(out)
    if err.strip():
        print("ERR", err[-1500:])
    return out

run("openvpn --version | head -3; openvpn --help 2>&1 | grep -iE 'epoch|compat|tls-ekm|dyn-tls|disable' | head -40")

# Try install newer openvpn from official repo if needed
run("""
set -e
if openvpn --help 2>&1 | grep -q disable-key-epoch; then echo HAS_DISABLE_KEY_EPOCH; fi
apt-cache policy openvpn | head -8
""")

conf = r'''port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp"
push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"
push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"
push "route 192.168.2.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
keepalive 10 120
compat-mode 2.4.0
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-crypt /etc/openvpn/server/tc.key
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 4
mute 10
max-clients 5
allow-compression no
disable-dco
'''

sftp = c.open_sftp()
with sftp.file("/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf", "w") as f:
    f.write(conf)
sftp.close()

run("""
systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 1
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
nft flush chain ip nat POSTROUTING
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "ens3" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
# Confirm what options apply
grep -n compat /etc/openvpn/server/server.conf
journalctl -u openvpn-server@server -n 25 --no-pager
""")
c.close()
print("DONE")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Switch OpenVPN from tls-crypt to tls-auth and rebuild client ovpns."""
import pathlib
import re
import sys

import paramiko

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

HOST = "5.188.18.103"
PASSWORD = "W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi"

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username="root", password=PASSWORD, timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)

remote = r"""
set -e
# Generate tls-auth key if missing
if [ ! -f /etc/openvpn/server/ta.key ]; then
  openvpn --genkey secret /etc/openvpn/server/ta.key
fi
cat > /etc/openvpn/server/server.conf <<'EOF'
port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp"
push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"
push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"
push "route 192.168.2.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.10.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 192.168.20.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
push "route 10.220.220.0 255.255.255.0 net_gateway"
keepalive 10 120
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-auth /etc/openvpn/server/ta.key 0
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 4
mute 10
max-clients 5
allow-compression no
disable-dco
EOF

# Rebuild client profiles on server
EASY=/etc/openvpn/easy-rsa
OUT=/root/openvpn-clients
mkdir -p "$OUT"
TA=$(cat /etc/openvpn/server/ta.key)
CA=$(cat /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt)
for u in user1 user2; do
  CERT=$(cat $EASY/pki/issued/$u.crt)
  KEY=$(cat $EASY/pki/private/$u.key)
  cat > "$OUT/$u.ovpn" <<EOF
client
dev tun
proto udp
remote 5.188.18.103 1194
resolv-retry infinite
nobind
persist-key
persist-tun
remote-cert-tls server
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
verb 3
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
disable-dco
windows-driver tap-windows6
key-direction 1
<ca>
$CA
</ca>
<cert>
$CERT
</cert>
<key>
$KEY
</key>
<tls-auth>
$TA
</tls-auth>
EOF
done

sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 1
nft list chain ip nat POSTROUTING >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
nft flush chain ip nat POSTROUTING 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "ens3" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep 1194
echo OK
"""

sftp = c.open_sftp()
with sftp.file("/tmp/ovpn_tlsauth.sh", "w") as f:
    f.write(remote)
sftp.chmod("/tmp/ovpn_tlsauth.sh", 0o700)
_, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/ovpn_tlsauth.sh", timeout=40)
print(o.read().decode())
err = e.read().decode()
if err.strip():
    print("ERR", err[-2000:])

# Pull client configs to desktop + GUI config dir
desk = pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop")
gui = pathlib.Path(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config")
gui.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for u in ("user1", "user2"):
    data = sftp.file(f"/root/openvpn-clients/{u}.ovpn").read().decode()
    for p in (desk / f"openvpn-bypass-{u}.ovpn", gui / f"openvpn-bypass-{u}.ovpn"):
        p.write_text(data, encoding="utf-8", newline="\n")
        print("saved", p, "bytes", p.stat().st_size)

sftp.close()
c.close()
print("DONE")

import paramiko
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(
    "5.188.18.103",
    username="root",
    password="W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi",
    timeout=25,
    allow_agent=False,
    look_for_keys=False,
)

script = r"""
set -e
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get install -y -qq build-essential libssl-dev liblzo2-dev liblz4-dev libpam0g-dev pkg-config libnl-genl-3-dev libcap-ng-dev autoconf automake libtool wget >/tmp/builddeps.log 2>&1
cd /tmp
rm -rf openvpn-2.7.5 openvpn-2.7.5.tar.gz
wget -q https://swupdate.openvpn.org/community/releases/openvpn-2.7.5.tar.gz -O openvpn-2.7.5.tar.gz || wget -q https://github.com/OpenVPN/openvpn/releases/download/v2.7.5/openvpn-2.7.5.tar.gz -O openvpn-2.7.5.tar.gz
tar xf openvpn-2.7.5.tar.gz
cd openvpn-2.7.5
./configure --prefix=/usr/local --enable-shared=no --disable-unit-tests 2>&1 | tail -20
make -j$(nproc) 2>&1 | tail -30
make install 2>&1 | tail -10
/usr/local/sbin/openvpn --version | head -4 || /usr/local/bin/openvpn --version | head -4
which -a openvpn
# Point systemd unit to new binary by drop-in
mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/openvpn-server@server.service.d
cat > /etc/systemd/system/openvpn-server@server.service.d/override.conf <<'EOF'
[Service]
ExecStart=
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/openvpn --status /run/openvpn-server/status-server.log --status-version 2 --suppress-timestamps --config server.conf
EOF
# if binary is in bin not sbin
if [ ! -x /usr/local/sbin/openvpn ] && [ -x /usr/local/bin/openvpn ]; then
  sed -i 's|/usr/local/sbin/openvpn|/usr/local/bin/openvpn|' /etc/systemd/system/openvpn-server@server.service.d/override.conf
fi
systemctl daemon-reload
# keep current server.conf (tls-auth)
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 2
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server
ss -ulnp | grep 1194
ps aux | grep '[o]penvpn'
nft flush chain ip nat POSTROUTING 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "ens3" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade
journalctl -u openvpn-server@server -n 15 --no-pager
echo BUILD_OK
"""

sftp = c.open_sftp()
with sftp.file("/tmp/build_ovpn27.sh", "w") as f:
    f.write(script)
sftp.chmod("/tmp/build_ovpn27.sh", 0o700)
sftp.close()
print("building... this may take a few minutes")
_, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/build_ovpn27.sh", timeout=600)
print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
if err.strip():
    print("ERR", err[-4000:])
c.close()

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Fix systemd + temporarily disable redirect-gateway so remote access stays up while testing data channel."""
import pathlib
import re
import sys

import paramiko

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(
    "5.188.18.103",
    username="root",
    password="W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi",
    timeout=25,
    allow_agent=False,
    look_for_keys=False,
)

conf = r"""port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
# NO redirect-gateway yet — keep office/remote-access routing intact while testing tunnel
push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"
push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"
keepalive 10 120
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-auth /etc/openvpn/server/ta.key 0
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 4
mute 10
max-clients 5
allow-compression no
disable-dco
"""

override = r"""[Service]
Type=simple
RemainAfterExit=no
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2
TimeoutStartSec=0
ExecStart=
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/openvpn --status /run/openvpn-server/status-server.log --status-version 2 --suppress-timestamps --config server.conf
"""

script = r"""
set -e
cat > /etc/openvpn/server/server.conf <<'EOF'
""" + conf + """EOF
mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/openvpn-server@server.service.d
cat > /etc/systemd/system/openvpn-server@server.service.d/override.conf <<'EOF'
""" + override + """EOF
systemctl daemon-reload
# soft restart: brief blip on 1194 only, does not touch client Windows routing of remote access
systemctl restart openvpn-server@server
sleep 2
sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1
nft flush chain ip nat POSTROUTING 2>/dev/null || true
nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname "ens3" ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade
systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server || true
ss -ulnp | grep 1194
ps aux | grep '[o]penvpn' | grep -v grep
# rebuild client ovpns (no redirect needed client-side; server won't push it)
EASY=/etc/openvpn/easy-rsa
OUT=/root/openvpn-clients
TA=$(cat /etc/openvpn/server/ta.key)
CA=$(cat /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt)
for u in user1 user2; do
  CERT=$(awk '/BEGIN CERTIFICATE/,/END CERTIFICATE/' $EASY/pki/issued/$u.crt)
  KEY=$(cat $EASY/pki/private/$u.key)
  cat > "$OUT/$u.ovpn" <<EOF
client
dev tun
proto udp
remote 5.188.18.103 1194
resolv-retry infinite
nobind
persist-key
persist-tun
remote-cert-tls server
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
verb 3
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
disable-dco
windows-driver tap-windows6
key-direction 1
<ca>
$CA
</ca>
<cert>
$CERT
</cert>
<key>
$KEY
</key>
<tls-auth>
$TA
</tls-auth>
EOF
done
echo CLIENTS_OK
"""

sftp = c.open_sftp()
with sftp.file("/tmp/safe_fix_ovpn.sh", "w") as f:
    f.write(script)
sftp.chmod("/tmp/safe_fix_ovpn.sh", 0o700)
_, o, e = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/safe_fix_ovpn.sh", timeout=60)
print(o.read().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
err = e.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
if err.strip():
    print("ERR", err[-1500:])

desk = pathlib.Path(r"E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop")
gui = pathlib.Path(r"C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config")
gui.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for u in ("user1", "user2"):
    data = sftp.file(f"/root/openvpn-clients/{u}.ovpn").read().decode()
    for p in (desk / f"openvpn-bypass-{u}.ovpn", gui / f"openvpn-bypass-{u}.ovpn"):
        p.write_text(data, encoding="utf-8", newline="\n")
        print("saved", p)

sftp.close()
c.close()
print("DONE")

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect("5.188.18.103", username="root", password="W9yYgPwJ3u69x9Vi", timeout=25, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)

# What epoch-related options exist?
_, o, _ = c.exec_command("/usr/local/sbin/openvpn --help 2>&1 | grep -iE 'epoch|compat|legacy|aeade'", timeout=15)
print("HELP:", o.read().decode())

conf = r"""port 1194
proto udp
dev tun
user nobody
group nogroup
persist-key
persist-tun
topology subnet
server 10.8.0.0 255.255.255.0
ifconfig-pool-persist /var/log/openvpn/ipp.txt
push "dhcp-option DNS 1.1.1.1"
push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8"
keepalive 10 120
compat-mode 2.6.0
data-ciphers AES-256-GCM
data-ciphers-fallback AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
tls-auth /etc/openvpn/server/ta.key 0
ca /etc/openvpn/server/ca.crt
cert /etc/openvpn/server/server.crt
key /etc/openvpn/server/server.key
dh /etc/openvpn/server/dh.pem
tls-version-min 1.2
remote-cert-tls client
explicit-exit-notify 1
tun-mtu 1400
mssfix 1360
status /var/log/openvpn/openvpn-status.log
log-append /var/log/openvpn/openvpn.log
verb 4
mute 10
max-clients 5
allow-compression no
disable-dco
"""
sftp = c.open_sftp()
with sftp.file("/etc/openvpn/server/server.conf", "w") as f:
    f.write(conf)
sftp.close()

_, o, e = c.exec_command(
    "systemctl restart openvpn-server@server; sleep 2; systemctl is-active openvpn-server@server; "
    "ss -ulnp | grep 1194; nft flush chain ip nat POSTROUTING; "
    "nft add rule ip nat POSTROUTING oifname ens3 ip saddr 10.8.0.0/24 masquerade; "
    "sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1",
    timeout=30,
)
print(o.read().decode())
print(e.read().decode()[-800:])
c.close()
print("SERVER_OK")

# Update configs: drop persist-tun so old TAP is not reused
foreach ($f in @(
  'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config\openvpn-bypass-user1.ovpn',
  'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\config\openvpn-bypass-user2.ovpn',
  'E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop\openvpn-bypass-user1.ovpn',
  'E:\Data\Users\cherkasov.n\Desktop\openvpn-bypass-user2.ovpn'
)) {
  if (-not (Test-Path $f)) { continue }
  $t = Get-Content $f -Raw
  $t = $t -replace '(?m)^persist-tun\r?\n',''
  if ($t -notmatch 'windows-driver wintun') {
    $t = $t -replace 'disable-dco',"disable-dco`nwindows-driver wintun"
  } else {
    $t = $t -replace 'windows-driver tap-windows6','windows-driver wintun'
  }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($f, ($t -replace "`r`n","`n"), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  Write-Host "cfg $f"
}

     C:\Users\cherkasov.n\OpenVPN\log\openvpn-bypass-user1.log

content.text:
Продолжил аккуратно — удалённый доступ не трогал.

Сейчас:
- Сервер на **OpenVPN 2.7.5**, порт 1194 жив
- **Полный туннель выключен** — трафик офиса/ассистента в VPN не уводится
- Конфиги на рабочем столе обновлены под **Wintun**
- Скрипт: `OpenVPN-safe-start.bat` (+ краткая инструкция `OpenVPN-safe-start.txt`)

Нужен один твой шаг (UAC):
1. ПКМ по `OpenVPN-safe-start.bat` → от имени администратора  
2. Он поставит `wintun.dll`, уберёт только мёртвые маршруты `0.0.0.0/1` через VPN и подключит GUI  
3. Проверка: `ping 10.8.0.1`

Если пинг есть — напиши, включу обход интернета через VPS уже после проверки, чтобы ассистент не отвалился.
